items.corrected_text: Show that the boundary of the Möbius strip is not a retract of the Möbius strip.
items.message: Corrected the direction of the retract relation; under the standard definition, the Möbius strip cannot be a retract of its boundary because it is not a subspace of its boundary. The intended standard result is that the boundary is not a retract of the Möbius strip.
items.original_text: Show that the Mobius strip is not a retract of its boundary.
